default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content marketing strategies and explore new tools for Exec's sales-focused AI product.](https://fathom.video/share/zQQfLvPQkv1cQnyyZDzJG7hDCsx4jMpi?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on creating content around sales objections and GPT applications, with 20 targeted topics to be selected from a curated list](https://fathom.video/share/zQQfLvPQkv1cQnyyZDzJG7hDCsx4jMpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [New sales compensation simulator tool developed by Sean, potential for content marketing and SEO opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/zQQfLvPQkv1cQnyyZDzJG7hDCsx4jMpi?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Explore programmatic variants and city-specific data for the compensation calculator to enhance SEO and user value](https://fathom.video/share/zQQfLvPQkv1cQnyyZDzJG7hDCsx4jMpi?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy for Sales Objections

  - [Identified \~20 relevant topics related to sales objections and GPT applications](https://fathom.video/share/zQQfLvPQkv1cQnyyZDzJG7hDCsx4jMpi?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [Plan to create content incorporating GPT functionality within the page](https://fathom.video/share/zQQfLvPQkv1cQnyyZDzJG7hDCsx4jMpi?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [Add CTAs around the GPT element to drive sign-ups for AI role-play product](https://fathom.video/share/zQQfLvPQkv1cQnyyZDzJG7hDCsx4jMpi?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Aim: Create value-add content that ranks well and introduces Exec's brand to ICP](https://fathom.video/share/zQQfLvPQkv1cQnyyZDzJG7hDCsx4jMpi?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)

### Compensation Calculator Tool

  - [Sean built a comprehensive sales compensation simulator](https://fathom.video/share/zQQfLvPQkv1cQnyyZDzJG7hDCsx4jMpi?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [Features: Salary, commission, quota ramp, guarantees, and accelerators](https://fathom.video/share/zQQfLvPQkv1cQnyyZDzJG7hDCsx4jMpi?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Potential uses:](https://fathom.video/share/zQQfLvPQkv1cQnyyZDzJG7hDCsx4jMpi?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
      - [Content marketing around sales comp planning](https://fathom.video/share/zQQfLvPQkv1cQnyyZDzJG7hDCsx4jMpi?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
      - [SEO targeting "sales comp calculator" keyword](https://fathom.video/share/zQQfLvPQkv1cQnyyZDzJG7hDCsx4jMpi?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [Demonstrating ROI of effective sales onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/zQQfLvPQkv1cQnyyZDzJG7hDCsx4jMpi?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)

### Content Marketing Opportunities

  - [Explore "pink cloud content" approach: highly relevant but not directly about the product](https://fathom.video/share/zQQfLvPQkv1cQnyyZDzJG7hDCsx4jMpi?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [Consider creating roundup pieces for AI prospecting tools to capture search intent](https://fathom.video/share/zQQfLvPQkv1cQnyyZDzJG7hDCsx4jMpi?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Investigate programmatic variants of the compensation calculator for different industries or cities](https://fathom.video/share/zQQfLvPQkv1cQnyyZDzJG7hDCsx4jMpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [Add subtle, useful content within the calculator interface (e.g., subheadings, tooltips)](https://fathom.video/share/zQQfLvPQkv1cQnyyZDzJG7hDCsx4jMpi?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### Data Utilization and Constraints

  - [Unable to use customer data for content due to enterprise contract restrictions](https://fathom.video/share/zQQfLvPQkv1cQnyyZDzJG7hDCsx4jMpi?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Exploring alternative data sources for potential stat-based blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/zQQfLvPQkv1cQnyyZDzJG7hDCsx4jMpi?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Consider scraping public data (e.g., government websites) for city-specific salary information](https://fathom.video/share/zQQfLvPQkv1cQnyyZDzJG7hDCsx4jMpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Elvis to select 20 best topics from the sales objections list for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/zQQfLvPQkv1cQnyyZDzJG7hDCsx4jMpi?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [Research keywords around prospecting to identify valuable content angles](https://fathom.video/share/zQQfLvPQkv1cQnyyZDzJG7hDCsx4jMpi?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [Investigate SEO potential for the sales compensation calculator](https://fathom.video/share/zQQfLvPQkv1cQnyyZDzJG7hDCsx4jMpi?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Explore programmatic variants and city-specific data for the compensation tool](https://fathom.video/share/zQQfLvPQkv1cQnyyZDzJG7hDCsx4jMpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [Sean to consider adding subtle content elements to the calculator interface](https://fathom.video/share/zQQfLvPQkv1cQnyyZDzJG7hDCsx4jMpi?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Team to brainstorm additional calculator ideas for content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/zQQfLvPQkv1cQnyyZDzJG7hDCsx4jMpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
